summary: Litper Connect Hub v1.3 backend testing: all 24 new tests passed covering voices seed, ElevenLabs integration, TTS preview (success + invalid), new /metrics schema (norte/funnel/whatsapp/operacion/costos/trend/filters), chatea_pro /me, agent tool_calls, and regression seeds (novedades=18, skills=4, auth guard, health).

minor.issue: Field is named 'elevenlabs_voice_id' (not 'voice_id' as review request implies). Not a bug but a naming inconsistency to note for frontend.
No 'target' field (only value/recovered_value_cop/margin_recovered_cop/total_cost_cop/status). Acceptable if ROI is treated as computed value with no fixed target.
Uses 'baseline' + 'current' instead of 'target'. Accepted; document schema.

action_items: Consider standardising voice_id field name across API and docs (currently elevenlabs_voice_id).
Document that norte.roi_cop has no target and norte.rto_reduction uses baseline/current semantics.
critical_code_review_comments: TTS preview correctly returns audio/mpeg with body > 1KB and proper 502 on invalid voice.
ElevenLabs live integration confirmed working (real API key returns voices list).
New /metrics schema is comprehensive and includes 14-day trend arrays as specified.
Cost env vars exposed via response.costos.config as required.
Agent tool_calls are inside steps[].tool_calls (nested) — frontend should traverse this structure.
seed_data_creation: None new; used existing seeded voices/queue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_hub_v13.py covers v1.3 additions. Original test_hub.py (25 tests) still exists for regression. Voice field naming quirk (elevenlabs_voice_id) and norte.roi_cop lacking target field are known design choices, not bugs.
